user_bio:
Full-stack digital marketer with a strong technical side. Background in PPC/online advertising, email marketing, analytics, and marketing automation (Zapier, HubSpot, Zoho...) - and lately I've been going deeper into building AI automations and agentic systems in n8n. 

I create workflows that solve real business & marketing problems and turn manual processes into systems that run themselves. If something can be automated, I always find a way to do it.
